caption: A screen recording displays a website called "List Randomizer." A list of names, including "Matt Mcrae" and "Chris walker," is typed into a text field under the instruction "Part 1: Enter List Items." Beside the randomizer, a sidebar for "JASPYSCASEBREAKS.COM" features a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap, accompanied by the text "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" and a red YouTube "Subscribe" button. As the sequence progresses, the user clicks "Randomize" under "Part 2: Go!", which triggers a transition to a Google Spreadsheet. This spreadsheet displays a numbered list of the same names, such as "5. Richard Dunne" and "6. Matt Mcrae," and includes a timestamp: "Timestamp: 2020-06-27 02:59:13 UTC." The "JASPYSCASEBREAKS.COM" sidebar remains constant on the right side of the screen throughout the process.
